title: codereview: CCP-15.8.3 pseudocode references undefined ChannelHistory and u64_from_eui
description: The added pseudocode assumes ChannelHistory type and u64_from_eui helper not defined in spec or referenced impl. Must specify or remove. Also per-channel PER should be tracked separately per CCP-15 requirements for accurate avoidance. Tag: codereview. Discovered during first pass after adding frequency agility pseudocode in spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md:170.
